title: Viral TikTok DoorDash driver Olivia Henderson hit with felony charges, pleads not guilty
summary_full: A DoorDash driver faces felony charges for unlawful surveillance and misdemeanor for sharing a video of a customer inside his home. The driver claimed she felt unsafe, but authorities found no crime committed by the customer. The incident sparked a debate on safety versus privacy, leading to the driver's arrest and job loss.
